list.pageDescription: Manage your AI assistants — each one can have its own model, instructions, tools, and knowledge bases.
list.guideDescription: Create the assistant, choose the AI that replies, then test it in chat. Tools and knowledge stay optional.
list.needsSetupCount: {count, plural, one {# to finish} other {# to finish}}
list.configuredCount: {count, plural, one {# assistant configured} other {# assistants configured}}
list.emptyDescription: Create your first assistant to start chatting with AI. Each assistant gets its own model, instructions, tools, and knowledge bases.
list.loadErrorDescription: Your assistants may still exist, but the list is unavailable right now. Check the connection and try again.
list.deleteDescription: This permanently removes the assistant and its configuration versions. This action cannot be undone.

list.createNextDescription: You’ll go straight to the assistant page to choose its model, logo, and capabilities.
list.kindAssistantDescription: Answers directly using its tools and knowledge.

support.name: Support assistant
support.description: Answers customer questions with a clear, calm, solution-oriented tone.
support.prompt: You are a customer support assistant. Answer clearly, ask questions when needed, suggest concrete next steps, and flag when a request should be handed to a human.

suggestions.0: Help me reply to this customer
suggestions.1: Summarize this ticket and suggest next steps

hr.name: HR assistant
hr.description: Helps teams understand procedures, internal policies, and HR documents.
hr.prompt: You are an internal HR assistant. Explain policies carefully, state the limits of your knowledge, and recommend contacting HR for sensitive or personal cases.

suggestions.2: List the HR points to check

documents.name: Document assistant
documents.description: Analyzes, summarizes, and compares documents or knowledge bases.
documents.prompt: You are a document analysis assistant. Summarize information, cite available sources, separate facts from assumptions, and point out missing context.

sales.name: Sales assistant
sales.description: Drafts emails, offers, customer replies, and commercial summaries.
sales.prompt: You are a B2B sales assistant. Help write concise, contextual messages with clear next steps and a professional tone.

suggestions.1: Turn these notes into a commercial proposal
suggestions.2: Prepare a reply to this objection

project.name: Project manager
project.description: Turns discussions into action plans, decisions, and operational follow-up.
project.prompt: You are a project management assistant. Clarify goals, break work into steps, identify risks/dependencies, and suggest dated actions when useful.

suggestions.0: Create an action plan from these notes

toolConnections.title: Tool connections
toolConnections.description: Store personal endpoints and credentials for shared MCP tools. Secrets are encrypted and never shown to the model.
toolConnections.privacyDescription: Only a short-lived encrypted gateway context is sent during tool execution. Existing passwords cannot be read back from this screen.
toolConnections.loadFailedDescription: Existing connections may still be active. Reload them before adding or changing credentials.
toolConnections.provisionFailed: Unable to create the ServiceNow connector
toolConnections.provisionedSyncing: ServiceNow connector ready — syncing MCP tools
toolConnections.defaultFailed: Unable to update the default connection
toolConnections.emptyDescription: Create a connector for an MCP server to expose personal settings here.
toolConnections.serviceNowEmptyDescription: Add and sync the ServiceNow MCP server first, then provision its connector here.
toolConnections.provisionDescription: Choose the MCP gateway server that exposes ServiceNow tools. This creates the connector used by personal credentials.
toolConnections.adminRequiredDescription: Ask a workspace admin to provision the connector and sync the MCP tools. You can then add your private credentials.

toolConnections.syncedTools: {count, plural, one {# synced tool} other {# synced tools}}

toolConnections.configurationDescription: Endpoint and non-secret options sent encrypted to the gateway.

toolConnections.secretsDescription: Secrets are encrypted before storage and are not displayed again.
toolConnections.useAsDefaultDescription: Agents use this connection unless a tool-specific setting chooses another one.

delete.remoteWarning: Tool deleted; verify the remote workflow

shell.accessDeniedTitle: You don’t have access to this page
shell.accessDeniedDescription: Your role does not allow this feature. You can return to chat or contact an administrator if you need access.
shell.accessCheckFailedDescription: Sensitive actions remain unavailable until this check succeeds.

auth.brandTitle: Useful agents, governed by your team.
auth.brandDescription: Connect models, organize knowledge, and automate complex missions from one secure workspace.
auth.brandFooter: Deodis Maiah · built for operational teams
auth.benefitControl: Keep permissions, costs, and approvals under control
auth.signInDescription: Return to your assistants, conversations, and automations.
auth.signInFailed: Unable to sign in. Check your email and password, then try again.
auth.signUpDescription: Create your account, then configure your first assistant.
auth.signUpFailed: Unable to create your account. Check the fields, then try again.
auth.registrationClosedDescription: Ask an administrator to create your account.
auth.registrationCheckFailed: Unable to check whether registration is open
auth.registrationCheckFailedDescription: No account can be created until this check succeeds.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: This page does not exist or has moved.

workflows.title: Workflows
workflows.description: Build visual automations, publish them, and trigger them through the API.
workflows.emptyDescription: Create your first automation to connect assistants, APIs, logic, and custom code.
workflows.editorDescription: Arrange your logic, configure every step, then publish a stable API version.
workflows.runDescription: The test uses the latest saved version, even when it has not been published yet.
workflows.paletteHint: Choose a ready-to-use step. It connects to the selected step automatically when possible.
workflows.canvasHint: Connect step handles to define execution order.
workflows.configurationHint: Configure the selected step without writing code.
workflows.noSelection: Select a step to configure it.
workflows.pathHint: Use a path such as customer.email. Leave it empty to target the whole input where supported.
workflows.outputPathHint: Path where the result is stored, for example result.total.
workflows.templateHint: Insert data with '{{field}}' or the entire input with '{{input}}'.
workflows.pathsHint: One path per line, for example customer.email.
workflows.bodyHint: Optional JSON. Without a body, the full input is sent for POST, PUT, and PATCH.
workflows.noRunsHint: Start a test to inspect every step and its output.
workflows.runDetailFailed: Unable to load the run details.
workflows.fullscreen: Open the editor in full screen

agentic.title: Build with an agent
agentic.emptyDescription: Describe your need in your own words. The agent will update the workflow in front of you, and you can take over in visual mode at any time.
agentic.suggestionCreate: Create a workflow that prepares a clear summary from the incoming message.
agentic.suggestionImprove: Review this workflow and improve its structure without changing its goal.
agentic.placeholder: E.g. When a request arrives, have an assistant analyze it and prepare a response…
agentic.enterHint: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for a new line
agentic.historyLoadFailed: Unable to load this conversation’s history.
agentic.informationSubmitFailed: Unable to save the requested information.
agentic.secureInputHint: Sensitive values are masked, encrypted, and never revealed to the agent. It only receives a secure reference.
agentic.runApprovalHint: No real execution will start without your explicit approval. This request remains pinned to the tested version below.
agentic.runDecisionFailed: Unable to process this run request.
agentic.canvasEditHint: You can move, connect, and configure steps while the agent is working.
agentic.failed: Agentic mode could not update the workflow.
agentic.completed: The workflow is ready. You can ask for more changes or return to visual mode.
agentic.stopped: Editing stopped. Changes already shown remain available in the visual draft.

fields.debugNoteHint: Describe what you want to verify in the run details.

trigger.manual: Receives the JSON sent when the run starts.

agent.run: Delegates this step to a Maiah assistant.

data.rename: Moves a value to a new path.
data.parseJson: Converts JSON text into structured data.
data.stringifyJson: Converts structured data into JSON text.

text.transform: Trims, changes case, or replaces text.

list.filter: Keeps items that match a rule.
list.sort: Sorts a list by field and direction.
list.slice: Extracts a portion of a list.

logic.condition: Branches the flow between true and false.
logic.delay: Pauses the workflow for a short time.
logic.stop: Explicitly marks the end of a branch.

debug.snapshot: Captures the data here without changing it.

date.now: Adds the current date or timestamp.

scheduledTasks.title: Scheduled tasks
scheduledTasks.description: Ask an assistant to run instructions automatically at the time or cadence you choose.
scheduledTasks.loadErrorDescription: Scheduled tasks are unavailable until the assistant list can be verified.
scheduledTasks.tasksLoadErrorDescription: Existing tasks may still be active. Reload the list before creating or changing schedules.
scheduledTasks.sectionHint: These tasks run automatically with the selected assistant. Results are posted to a dedicated conversation created on the first run.

defaults.title: News briefing
defaults.prompt: Prepare a clear, sourced briefing of this morning’s major news. Group items by topic and finish with the points to watch.

create.title: Create a task
create.description: Define the expected result, assistant, and run cadence.

overview.title: Tasks
overview.description: {active, plural, =0 {No active tasks out of {total}} one {# active task out of {total}} other {# active tasks out of {total}}}.
overview.activeCount: {count, plural, =0 {None active} one {# active} other {# active}}

empty.title: No scheduled tasks
empty.description: Create your first task to automate a briefing, report, or recurring follow-up.

noAssistants.title: No assistant available
noAssistants.description: Create an assistant before scheduling an automatic task.

scheduledTasks.deleteDescription: {title} will stop running. Existing conversations will be kept.
